description_long: This handbag features a rectangular, flat profile with a woven straw or rattan exterior in a light yellowish-beige color, bordered by a sleek black trim. The bag is framed with black material along all edges, providing both structure and contrast to the natural woven body. A single black wrist strap is attached to one side with a gold-tone metal clasp, adding a touch of elegance and functionality. The surface of the bag is smooth but textured due to the interlaced pattern of the woven material. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible logos or decorative embellishments, emphasizing the natural beauty of the woven pattern. The closure mechanism is not fully visible but appears to be a zipper running along the top edge.
description: Rectangular woven straw handbag with black trim and a single black wrist strap, featuring a minimalist and natural design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full woven straw surface bordered by black trim, with the wrist strap visible on the right.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the slim profile of the bag and the attachment point of the black wrist strap with a gold clasp.
description_view_2: The back view mirrors the front, displaying the woven straw surface and black trim, with the wrist strap now on the left.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again highlights the bag's thinness and the black trim, with the wrist strap attachment less visible.
attribute_strap_type: single wrist strap, short, non-adjustable, attached with a gold-tone clasp to one side
attribute_closure_mechanism: zipper closure along the top edge, partially visible in side views
